pages.text: Golems don't trail behind you. A golem guards the area where you built it, wandering nearby and striking back at anything that hurts it or its owner.$(br2)Only $(o)block golems$() (chest, furnace, anvil, etc.) can be told to $(o)sit$(): sneak and right-click one to make it hold its exact spot.

Combat golems can be aimed: the $(item)Target Book$() (see Tools) sets which mobs they hunt.$(br2)Turrets hold the spot where you build them and cover the area around them and don't wander, though a $(item)Feather$() upgrade lets you push one to a new spot. Block golems are utility only and don't fight.
